name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions:
1. Slice the chicken breast into thin strips. Cut the bell pepper and carrot into matchsticks. Shred the cabbage thinly. Mince the garlic and grate the ginger.

2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.

3. Add garlic and ginger, stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.

4. Add chicken strips and cook for 3-4 minutes until golden and almost cooked through.

5. Add bell pepper, carrot, and cabbage. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender.

6. Pour in soy sauce and season with salt. Stir everything together and cook for 1 more minute.

7. Garnish with sliced scallion. Serve hot immediately.
simpleInstructions:
1. Slice chicken and prep vegetables: bell pepper, carrot, cabbage, garlic, ginger.

2. Heat oil in a hot skillet. Add garlic and ginger, cook 30 seconds.

3. Add chicken and cook 3-4 minutes. Add vegetables and cook 2-3 minutes.

4. Season with soy sauce and salt. Garnish with scallion. Serve hot.
